title: TEMPLE_TRANSMUTATION_REQUEST_V1
description: Typed bridge artifact: routes a HAL-passed TEMPLE export candidate to the Mayor pipeline. Non-sovereign — carries provenance only. Authority=NONE. Mayor assembles SKILL_PROMOTION_PACKET_V1 from this.

request_id.description: Unique identifier for this transmutation request

source_session_id.description: ID of the originating TEMPLE_EXPLORATION_V1 session

source_artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the source TEMPLE_EXPLORATION_V1. Load-bearing provenance.

export_candidate_id.description: ID of the specific export_candidate within the source TEMPLE session

export_hal_verdict.description: HAL verdict on the export candidate. BLOCK is not transmitted — it is dropped at the TEMPLE bridge.

proposed_version.description: Semantic version of the proposed skill

parent_skill_id.description: Parent skill in active_skills. Mayor verifies this exists before routing to reducer.

capability_description.description: Human-readable description of the capability gap being addressed

failure_cluster_hash.description: Optional: hash of the NEW_SKILL_DISCOVERY_V1 that motivated this request

transmutation_status.description: PENDING = awaiting Mayor routing. SUBMITTED = Mayor has received it. WITHDRAWN = retracted before Mayor decision.

authority.description: Transmutation requests carry zero institutional authority. Authority is granted only by reducer-emitted decisions.
